case_title: THOMPSON EDWARD WAYNE VS HOTEL RESTAURANT EMPLOYEES UNION LOCAL 340 CIOAF L et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
